title: Descriptions Test Schema
description: Tests x-graphql-description attribute for GraphQL-specific descriptions

DocumentedType.description: This is the JSON Schema description
DocumentedType.x-graphql-description: This is the GraphQL-specific description that should be used instead

field_with_both_descriptions.description: JSON Schema description for this field

field_with_json_description_only.description: This field only has a JSON Schema description

field_with_graphql_description_only.x-graphql-description: This field only has a GraphQL description

MultilineDescriptions.x-graphql-description:
This type has a multiline description.

It includes multiple paragraphs to test
proper formatting in GraphQL SDL output.

Third paragraph for good measure.

field_with_multiline.x-graphql-description:
First line of description.
Second line of description.
Third line of description.

field_with_markdown.x-graphql-description:
This description contains **bold** and *italic* text.

It also has:
- List item 1
- List item 2
- List item 3

DescriptionPriority.description: Testing description priority - this is the base description

override_with_graphql.description: Base description that should be overridden

fallback_to_json.description: This should be used as fallback

SpecialCharactersInDescription.x-graphql-description: Description with "quotes" and 'apostrophes' and special chars: <>&

field_with_unicode.x-graphql-description: Unicode characters: 你好 🚀 émojis and accénts

EmptyAndWhitespaceDescriptions.description: Testing edge cases with empty and whitespace descriptions

current_field.x-graphql-description: This is the current recommended field

deprecated_field.x-graphql-description: @deprecated Use currentField instead. This field will be removed in v2.0

legacy_field.description: Legacy field - should use GraphQL description
